summary: Modern vaginal dose assessment should focus on volumetric metrics such as D90 and D2cc rather than individual dose-points because they better represent overall treatment effectiveness and organ at risk protection. Isolated dose-point evaluations fail to account for the full complexity of spatial dose distribution in advanced imaging-guided treatments.
